_meta.note: Major/Career Compass earnings data is provided by the operator (College Scorecard field-of-study earnings + an O*NET/BLS-style career dataset). No salaries are fabricated. Populate `majors` and `careers` below with real rows, each carrying a verifiable source_url, then run `npm run ingest:compass`. Until then the Compass shows majors/careers as available and labels earnings as 'pending dataset', never a made-up number.

format.careers: [{ major_name, career_title, onet_code?, median_wage_annual|null, source_url (https), provenance: 'curated_public' }]
